title: Fluffy Smoky Roasted Tomato Argentinian Stir-fry
description: This savory and hearty dish features smoky roasted tomatoes cooked with aromatic herbs and served as a brunch-friendly main course.
instructions: Cut the tomato into bite-sized pieces and place them on a baking sheet. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle salt and pepper evenly over each piece.
Mix chopped garlic, lime juice, and herbs in a small bowl, then brush onto tomatoes for even coating.
Roast the tomatoes for about 20-25 minutes or until they're lightly golden and tender.
In a separate pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add spinach leaves and sauté until wilted, adding more oil if necessary to prevent sticking.
Once the tomatoes are ready, toss them with roasted spinach and chopped garlic. Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
